title: Eumachia abrupta
taxonomy: Eumachia abrupta is classified within the family Rubiaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Eumachia, which is a small group of flowering plants. Eumachia abrupta is native to tropical Africa, specifically in the regions of Madagascar and the Comoros Islands. The classification of Eumachia abrupta is further supported by its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. As a member of the Rubiaceae family, Eumachia abrupta is closely related to other plants in the same family.
